name: Base Gate: Access Logic
description: This gate, which is in use at the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base, features a special circular metal door frame adorned with eye-catching illuminated signs.\nThe advantage of the circular door frame design lies in the equal distance from any point on the frame to the center, which makes it easier to transport irregularly shaped parts. The base has also installed illuminated signs here, making the gate easy to spot at night and ensuring convenient access for both personnel and materials alike.
